title: Minecast Podcast Mod
body:
The Podcast Mod brings a whole new level of immersion to Minecraft by letting you listen to your favorite podcasts directly in-game. No more switching tabs or running extra apps in the background—this mod allows you to stream, queue, and control podcast playback while you play.

- **Requirements : Gekolib Mod 1.20.1** 
- if you want this on server then you have to install this mod on **Forge server** too.

Whether you’re mining, building, or exploring, you can keep up with the latest episodes of your favorite shows without leaving Minecraft. The mod is lightweight, easy to use, and fully customizable, making it perfect for casual players, streamers, and podcast lovers alike.

**✨ Features**
🎧 In-game podcast playback – listen while you play
📻 Custom podcast list – add your own RSS feeds or streaming links
⏯️ Playback controls – play, pause, skip, or adjust volume anytime
🪶 Lightweight & performance friendly – won’t affect FPS
🌍 Works in singleplayer & multiplayer
🚀 Why use this mod?

The Podcast Mod makes Minecraft a more relaxing and engaging experience. Whether you enjoy true crime, gaming news, or educational shows, you can now combine your favorite audio content with endless Minecraft adventures.
